zh.lifeSummary: 當Matthew Giffard於1262年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，他的父親Bartholomew Giffard35歲，母親Joan de Halsbury31歲。他於1293年與Mrs. Matthew Gifford在英國英格蘭素瑞斯托克 達阿波農結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世在英國英格蘭素瑞格德斯同。

nameMeanings.name: Giffard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: (i) relationship name from the Continental Germanic personal name Gifard. (ii) nickname, perhaps sometimes from Old French giffard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Guiver
meanings: English: (i) nickname, apparently from Middle English giver ‘giver, donor, bestower’. (ii) variant of Giffard with voicing of /f/ to /v/ and loss of final -d.

variants.name: Gafford
meanings: English (southeastern): assimilated form of Gatford, a name of various origins. In Sussex and Surrey it is perhaps a variant of the habitational name Catford from a place so called in Somerset. Gatford is also from the habitational names Gateford (in Worksop, Nottinghamshire) or Gateforth (near Selby, Yorkshire), both formed with Old English gāt ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’, influenced by Old Norse geit ‘goat’.

Probably also an altered form of German Gaffert: habitational name from Gaffert near Köslin, Brandenburg, or from a personal name formed with Middle High German gate ‘fellow, companion’. The surname Gaffert is very rare in Germany.

English: perhaps an altered form of Gatewood , an occupational name for a ‘goatherd’ (Middle English gate-werde, Old English gātweard) or for a ‘gate keeper’ (Middle English gateward, Old English ʒeatweard, dialect gātward).

variants.name: Gifford
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

nameMeanings.name: Matthew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

en.lifeSummary: When Matthew Giffard was born in 1262, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Bartholomew Giffard, was 35 and his mother, Joan de Halsbury, was 31. He married Mrs. Matthew Gifford in 1293, in Stoke D'abernon, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in Godstone, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matthew Giffard est né en 1262, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Bartholomew Giffard, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Joan de Halsbury, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Matthew Gifford en 1293, à Stoke D'abernon, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé à Godstone, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1293 in Stoke D'abernon, Surrey, England, United Kingdom Mrs. Matthew Gifford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb in Godstone, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Matthew Giffardが1262年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Bartholomew Giffardは35歳，母Joan de Halsburyは31歳であった。1293年にイギリスイギリススリーストク ド'アバーノンでMrs. Matthew Giffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリススリーゴドストーンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matthew Giffard(이)가 1262년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bartholomew Giffard(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Halsbury(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1293년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 스토크 드'압른넌에서 Mrs. Matthew Gifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 수리 고드스톤에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matthew Giffard родился в 1262 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Bartholomew Giffard было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Halsbury, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Matthew Gifford в 1293 г. в местности сток д'абирнон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в местности годстоун, сурри, Англия, Великобритания.
